THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREAT SENECA FINANCIAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORDEIRO, HENRIQUE $4,446.93 PRINCIPAL, $203.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,650.23, SEE SCANNED DOC
